queries.name: Revenue by country
queries.description: Total revenue per country from the daily_sales aggregate (fed by the mv_daily_sales materialized view). A LowCardinality category on the X axis → horizontal Bar.
queries.sql:
SELECT country, sum(revenue) AS revenue
FROM shop.daily_sales
GROUP BY country
ORDER BY revenue DESC

queries.name: Daily revenue
queries.description: Revenue per day across the last ~90 days, from daily_sales. A Date X axis is auto-detected as a time series → filled Area chart.
queries.sql:
SELECT day, sum(revenue) AS revenue
FROM shop.daily_sales
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day

queries.name: Revenue by category
queries.description: Revenue per product category from category_revenue — the mv_category_revenue view derives the category with dictGet() against the products_dict dictionary. A small breakdown → Pie.
queries.sql:
SELECT category, sum(revenue) AS revenue
FROM shop.category_revenue
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY revenue DESC

queries.name: Event type mix
queries.description: Share of raw events by type (purchase / view / cart) straight from events_raw. A small categorical split → Pie with a legend.
queries.sql:
SELECT event_type, count() AS events
FROM shop.events_raw
GROUP BY event_type
ORDER BY events DESC

queries.name: Top 15 products by revenue
queries.description: Joins events_raw to the products dimension table for readable names, summing purchase amounts. Horizontal Bar of the top 15.
queries.sql:
SELECT p.name AS product, round(sum(e.amount)) AS revenue
FROM shop.events_raw AS e
INNER JOIN shop.products AS p ON p.product_id = e.product_id
WHERE e.event_type = 'purchase'
GROUP BY product
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 15

queries.name: Daily active users
queries.description: Distinct users per day, merged from the hourly_active_users AggregatingMergeTree with uniqMerge() — shows how an AggregateFunction state is finalized. Date axis → Line.
queries.sql:
SELECT toDate(hour) AS day, uniqMerge(users) AS users
FROM shop.hourly_active_users
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day

queries.name: Revenue trend by country
queries.description: Daily revenue for four countries at once — the country column drives the Series, producing one Line per country with a legend.
queries.sql:
SELECT day, country, sum(revenue) AS revenue
FROM shop.daily_sales
WHERE country IN ('US', 'GB', 'DE', 'JP')
GROUP BY day, country
ORDER BY day

queries.name: Traffic by hour of day
queries.description: Event volume by hour of day (0–23) from events_raw. A numeric ordinal X axis → vertical Column chart.
queries.sql:
SELECT toHour(event_time) AS hour, count() AS events
FROM shop.events_raw
GROUP BY hour
ORDER BY hour
